ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the period */,
  "volumefrom" REAL /* Volume of the base asset traded */,
  "volumeto" REAL /* Volume of the quoted asset traded */,
  "close_12_ema" REAL /* 12-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of the closing price */,
  "close_26_ema" REAL /* 26-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of the closing price */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) value */,
  "macds" REAL /* MACD Signal Line */,
  "macdh" REAL /* MACD Histogram */,
  "close_12_ema_prev" REAL /* Previous 12-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) value */,
  "close_26_ema_prev" REAL /* Previous 26-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) value */,
  "trading_volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "base_asset_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the base asset */,
  "quoted_asset_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the quoted asset */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Binance, Coinbase) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., centralized, decentralized) */,
  "trading_fees" REAL /* Trading fees for the exchange */,
  "withdrawal_fees" REAL /* Withdrawal fees for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Binance API, CoinMarketCap API) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data collection */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last synced */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source updates its data (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "ingest_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was ingested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion process (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message providing additional information about the status */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level for the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Log category for the log entry (e.g., data ingestion, data processing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
